results.title: Hot Toys Reveales Cool New SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY Collectible Figure
results.description: With Spider-Man: Brand New Day getting closer to its theatrical debut, Hot Toys has revealed the first collectible from the movie. Fans have been eager to see how Peter Parker's latest costume would translate into a sixth scale figure, and this preview doesn't disappoint. The figure offers a spectacular look at the new Spider-Man suit. They are releasing a regular and a deluxe version. The regular one includes some swap out eye lenses, interchangeable hands, a key, a phone, and webbing. The deluxe version adds a vest, a knit hat, and a deluxe display base. The newly revealed Spider-Man Sixth Scale Figure puts the spotlight on Peter Parker's fresh costume, showcasing the incredible level of detail Hot Toys is known for. From the textures and web pattern to the sharp color scheme, it already looks like it'll be another must-have for Marvel collectors. One detail that's getting plenty of attention is what appears to be the deluxe edition display base. Based on the preview images, it looks like collectors may get a massive Scorpion tail as part of the display, adding even more fuel to speculation that Scorpion will have a major presence in the film. Hot Toys hasn't shared any additional details just yet, but the complete reveal shouldn't be too far away. There's a chance it could arrive as soon as tomorrow, though waiting until next Monday would also make sense. Spider-Man was always going to be the first figure announced, but the bigger question is what comes next. A Hulk figure seems like an obvious possibility, especially given the character's expected role in the movie. After that, things become much less predictable. Scorpion feels like the safest bet among the confirmed villains, although Boomerang and Tarantula could easily receive figures later if they end up having memorable appearances. I’m sure we’ll see one for Punisher as well. Then there's the mystery surrounding Sadie Sink 's character. Because Marvel has kept her role under wraps, any collectible based on her would probably stay hidden until well after the movie's release to avoid spoilers. The film's official synopsis reads: "It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. “But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see. The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them." Spider-Man: Brand New Day swings into theaters on July 31, and if this first Hot Toys reveal is any indication, collectors are going to have plenty to get excited about alongside the movie's release. View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize View fullsize Spider-Man: Brand New Day – Spider-Man 1/6th Scale Collectible Figure A brand-new chapter is about to unfold! Following the reality-altering events that left him without a past, Peter Parker is embracing a fresh start. Returning to his street-level roots, he is once again the anonymous protector of New York City, relying solely on his own grit, intellect, and handmade gear to face down a rising tide of crime. To celebrate the wall-crawler’s next cinematic adventure, Hot Toys is thrilled to introduce the 1/6th scale Spider-Man Collectible Figure from Spider-Man: Brand New Day! This figure features a finely crafted masked head equipped with four pairs of interchangeable eye-pieces, allowing fans to mix and match to create a wide variety of Spidey’s expressions. Reflecting Peter’s growth into a seasoned hero, the figure’s upgraded body design boasts enhanced proportions and a bulkier, more heroic physique. To perfectly complement this body, the red and blue colored elastic fabric material suit has also been enhanced to allow for maximum flexibility, providing collectors the freedom to recreate Spider-Man’s dynamic poses and mid-air acrobatics with vastly improved articulation. Coming with ten interchangeable hands, collectors have everything they need to display the wall-crawler in endless crime-fighting scenarios. Ready for action in the streets of NYC, the figure is packed with screen-accurate accessories, including a pair of newly designed Web-Shooters that are magnetically attachable to Spider-Man’s forearms, a variety of spider-web effects, a mobile phone, and a Key to the City of New York. The figure can be beautifully displayed on a specially designed dynamic figure stand featuring the movie logo and character nameplate. It’s a brand new day for your Marvel collection — don’t miss the chance to pre-order this spectacular, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man today! Specifications Product Code: MMS892 Product Name: Spider-Man Height: Approximately 28.5 cm tall Points of Articulations: 30 Special Features: Authentic and detailed likeness of Spider-Man in Spider-Man: Brand New Day Product Release Date: Approximately Q3 – Q4, 2026 The 1/6th scale Spider-Man Collectible Figure specially features: – Authentic and detailed likeness of Spider-Man in Spider-Man: Brand New Day – Finely crafted masked head with four (4) pairs of interchangeable eye pieces – Approximately 28.5 cm tall – Body with enhanced proportions and 30 points of articulation – Ten (10) pieces of interchangeable hands, including: – One (1) pair of fists/web-holding hands – One (1) pair of relaxed/accessory-holding hands – One (1) pair of opened gesture hands – One (1) pair of surface-sticking gesture hands – One (1) pair of web-shooting hands Costume: – One (1) Spider-Man suit made of red and blue colored elastic fabric material Accessories: – Six (6) strings of spider web effects in different shapes and lengths – One (1) pair of Web-Shooters (magnetically attachable to Spider-Man’s forearms) – One (1) Key to the City of New York – One (1) mobile phone – Specially designed figure stand with movie logo and character nameplate ————————————————– Spider-Man: Brand New Day – Spider-Man (Deluxe Version) 1/6th Scale Collectible Figure Peter Parker’s fresh start in New York City is anything but easy. Stripped of his high-tech resources, our friendly neighborhood hero is back to basics, braving the daily grind of city life while tackling a formidable new wave of street-level threats. As fans eagerly await the cinematic release of Spider-Man: Brand New Day, Hot Toys is beyond excited to unveil the Deluxe Version of the 1/6th scale Spider-Man Collectible Figure. This figure boasts a finely crafted masked head sculpt with four pairs of interchangeable eye-pieces, allowing you to recreate a variety of expressions. The hero’s evolution is showcased through an enhanced body design, boasting a bulkier physique with improved proportions. Dressed in a tailored red and blue elastic fabric material suit, the figure offers extraordinary flexibility for achieving mid-air acrobatic poses. Paired with ten interchangeable hands, collectors can bring Peter’s dynamic combat style to life. Braving the chilly winds of the concrete jungle, this Deluxe Version exclusively features wardrobe additions that perfectly capture Peter’s street-savvy aesthetic, including a black beanie and a vibrant multi-colored striped puffer vest. He also comes fully equipped with a collection of essential gear, such as magnetically attachable Web-Shooters, six strings of spider-web effects, a mobile phone, and the symbolic Key to the City of New York. Taking your display to the next level, the Deluxe Version also includes a spectacularly designed battle-themed diorama figure base. This environmental piece plunges Spider-Man right into the middle of a perilous showdown, featuring a pair of Boomerang’s lethal boomerangs and the menacing tail of the Scorpion — complete with an embedded wire in the tip for dynamic posing possibilities! Step into a thrilling new chapter and elevate your Marvel collection with this extraordinary Deluxe Version of the friendly neighborhood Spider-Man. Pre-order now and let the street-level showdown begin! Specifications Product Code: MMS893 Product Name: Spider-Man (Deluxe Version) Height: Approximately 28.5 cm tall Points of Articulations: 30 Special Features: Authentic and detailed likeness of Spider-Man in Spider-Man: Brand New Day Product Release Date: Approximately Q2 – Q3, 2027 The 1/6th scale Spider-Man Collectible Figure (Deluxe Version) specially features: – Authentic and detailed likeness of Spider-Man in Spider-Man: Brand New Day – Finely crafted masked head with four (4) pairs of interchangeable eye pieces – Approximately 28.5 cm tall – Body with enhanced proportions and 30 points of articulation – Ten (10) pieces of interchangeable hands, including: – One (1) pair of fists/web-holding hands – One (1) pair of relaxed/accessory-holding hands – One (1) pair of opened gesture hands – One (1) pair of surface-sticking gesture hands – One (1) pair of web-shooting hands Costume: – One (1) Spider-Man suit made of red and blue colored elastic fabric material – One (1) black colored beanie* – One (1) multi-colored striped puffer vest* Accessories: – Six (6) strings of spider web effects in different shapes and lengths – One (1) pair of Web-Shooters (magnetically attachable to Spider-Man’s forearms) – One (1) Key to the City of New York – One (1) mobile phone – Specially designed battle-themed diorama figure base with Scorpion’s tail (bendable wire embedded in the tip of tail), a pair of Boomerang’s weapon Boomerangs, and a character nameplate* * Exclusive to Deluxe Version
